# Saurabh Yadav — Full Stack Developer

> Portfolio of Saurabh Yadav, Full Stack Software Engineer based in Surat, Gujarat, India.

## About

Saurabh Yadav is a Full Stack Engineer currently working at La Net Team Software Solutions Pvt. Ltd. in Surat, India.
He builds high-performing, scalable web applications across the entire software lifecycle — from system architecture through development, deployment, and optimization.

## Skills

- **Languages & Frameworks**: Python, Django, FastAPI, Node.js, React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, SQLite
- **AI & Machine Learning**: OpenAI, Anthropic (Claude), HuggingFace, LangChain, OpenRouter, NumPy, Pandas, OpenCV
- **Integrations**: Stripe, Razorpay, Google Maps, Swagger, Shopify, Meta, Google Ads, QuickBooks, Paytm
- **DevOps & Cloud**: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, Cloudflare, GitHub Actions, Datadog
- **Tools**: VS Code, PyCharm, Postman, Jira, Notion

## Experience

- **Full Stack Software Engineer** — La Net Team Software Solutions Pvt. Ltd., Surat, India (Sep 2024 – Present)
- **Full Stack Developer & Team Lead** — Yogya Capital, Remote (Dec 2023 – Mar 2024)
- **Full Stack Developer Intern** — theBackOffice, Remote (Jul 2023 – Nov 2023)

## Education

- B.Tech, Computer Science & Engineering
